testcase.name: test_buyer_login_and_catalogue
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter28_connectors_coppam_crmess.py:129: in test_buyer_login_and_catalogue assert r2.status_code == 200, f"Catalogue KO: {r2.status_code} {r2.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Catalogue KO: 404 {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
